##LOCALITY=Hilläng mines, Dalarna, Sweden

##SOURCE=Dan Holtstam
##DESCRIPTION=Pale greenish-yellow subhedral crystals associated with fayalite, spessartine, ferro-actinolite, calcite, magnetite and pyrite.  Type sample, escribed by Holtstam et al (2025)
